telco-operation-id-required.description: Every operation must have a stable operationId for APIOps, SDK generation and audit traceability.

telco-429-response-required.description: Commercial APIs must document quota and throttling behavior.

telco-no-api-key-auth.description: Commercial APIs should not rely on API key-only authentication.
telco-no-api-key-auth.message: API key security scheme detected. Use OAuth2/OIDC for commercial APIs.

telco-contact-owner-required.description: API contracts should expose an owner/contact for support and commercial accountability.
